alt.ro: Un copil cu masca loveste o paleta de antrenament tinuta de un instructor imbracat pentru sala de operatie, chiar la patul de spital.
alt.en: A masked child strikes a training pad held by an instructor dressed for the operating room right at the hospital bedside.

caption.ro: Exercitiile de Budo muta atentia dinspre frica spre actiune.
caption.en: Budo exercises shift attention away from fear and toward action.

alt.ro: Un copil cu masca si un instructor in echipament medical arata semnul de aprobare intr-un salon de spital.
alt.en: A masked child and an instructor in medical gear give a thumbs up in a hospital room.

caption.ro: Programul construieste incredere chiar in mijlocul tratamentului.
caption.en: The program builds confidence in the middle of treatment.

alt.ro: Un copil cu masca si un instructor in echipament de protectie ridica pumnii intr-un salon de spital.
alt.en: A masked child and an instructor in protective gear raise their fists inside a hospital room.

caption.ro: Curajul poate fi practicat in gesturi mici, repetabile si recognoscibile.
caption.en: Courage can be practiced through small, repeatable, recognizable gestures.

alt.ro: Un copil cu masca loveste o paleta de antrenament langa patul de spital, in timp ce un balon pluteste deasupra.
alt.en: A masked child strikes a training pad beside the hospital bed while a balloon floats overhead.

caption.ro: Interventia transforma salonul intr-un spatiu de miscare, joc si control.
caption.en: The intervention turns the room into a space for movement, play, and control.

alt.ro: Un copil cu masca sta langa patul de spital in timp ce instructorii pregatesc exercitiul.
alt.en: A masked child stands beside the hospital bed while instructors prepare the exercise.

caption.ro: Si momentele de pregatire fac parte din siguranta si increderea copilului.
caption.en: Preparation moments are also part of the child's safety and confidence.

alt.ro: Un copil cu masca si tricou rosu loveste o paleta de antrenament tinuta de instructor la patul de spital.
alt.en: A masked child in a red shirt punches a training pad held by an instructor at the hospital bedside.

caption.ro: Miscarea clara si orientata da forma increderii.
caption.en: Clear, directed movement gives shape to confidence.

alt.ro: Un copil cu masca, imbracat in kimono, loveste o paleta de antrenament intr-un salon de spital.
alt.en: A masked child wearing a gi strikes a training pad inside a hospital room.

caption.ro: Metoda isi pastreaza disciplina chiar si in contextul medical.
caption.en: The method keeps its discipline even inside a medical setting.

alt.ro: Mai multi voluntari in echipament Budo stau in jurul unui pacient cu masca, asezat pe patul de spital.
alt.en: Several Budo volunteers stand around a masked patient sitting on a hospital bed.

caption.ro: Comunitatea face diferenta dintre o vizita si un program sustenabil.
caption.en: Community makes the difference between a visit and a sustainable program.

alt.ro: Grup de practicanti si sustinatori fotografiati intr-o sala mare din Roma.
alt.en: A group of practitioners and supporters photographed inside a large room in Rome.

caption.ro: Istoria capitolului romanesc poate fi prezentata ca parte a unei mosteniri europene mai largi.
caption.en: The Romanian chapter can be framed as part of a broader European legacy.

alt.ro: Fotografie documentara cu fondatorul KKC alaturi de un reprezentant al programului.
alt.en: Documentary photograph of the KKC founder alongside a program representative.

caption.ro: Legatura cu miscarea internationala aduce legitimitate si continuitate.
caption.en: The link to the international movement brings legitimacy and continuity.

alt.ro: Colaj cu o aparitie in presa italiana despre Kids Kicking Cancer.
alt.en: Collage showing Italian press coverage about Kids Kicking Cancer.

caption.ro: Vizibilitatea publica este parte din misiune, nu doar un rezultat secundar.
caption.en: Public visibility is part of the mission, not just a side effect.
